# Plug-in View Keys

**API Collection**

Keys for the user dictionary passed to [doc://com.apple.securityinterface/documentation/SecurityInterface/SFAuthorizationPluginView/willActivate(withUser:)].

## Constants

- **SFAuthorizationPluginViewUserNameKey**: An `NSString` object with the user’s (long) name.
- **SFAuthorizationPluginViewUserShortNameKey**: An `NSString` object with the user’s short name.

## Constants

- **SFCertificateViewDisclosureStateDidChange**
- **SFDisplayViewException**: Raised when an error occurs in displaying the authorization dialog.
